title: Marketplace Manager - Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Consulting Pvt Ltd!
